lines.speaker: Host
lines.line: Welcome back, everyone! Today we have a special deal on these wireless earbuds.
lines.trans: 欢迎大家回来！今天我们这款无线耳机有特价活动。

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: How much are they? Can you test the sound quality?
lines.trans: 多少钱？能试一下音质吗？

lines.speaker: Host
lines.line: Only thirty-nine dollars today, down from seventy-nine! Listen to this sound test.
lines.trans: 今天只要39美元，原价79美元！来听听这个音质测试。

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: Wow, that sounds pretty good. Do they come in black?
lines.trans: 哇，听起来不错。有黑色的吗？

lines.speaker: Host
lines.line: Yes, we have black, white, and blue. Type your color in the chat, and I will hold one for you.
lines.trans: 有的，有黑色、白色和蓝色。在评论区打出颜色，我帮您留一个。

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: Black, please. I want two pairs. Is the shipping free?
lines.trans: 请给我黑色。我想要两副。包邮吗？

lines.speaker: Host
lines.line: Free shipping for two or more! Add to cart now and check out in ten minutes before the deal ends.
lines.trans: 两副以上包邮！现在就加入购物车，十分钟内付款，活动就结束了。

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: Okay, I just placed the order. Thanks for the discount!
lines.trans: 好的，我刚下单了。谢谢优惠！

lines.speaker: Host
lines.line: Thank you for the order! I will send a small gift with your package. See you next time!
lines.trans: 感谢您的订单！我会随包裹送一个小礼物。下次再见！
